option.name: originalContent
option.value:
name: Azure Static Web Apps CI/CD
env: FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24: true
on: push: branches: - main pull_request: types: [opened, synchronize, reopened, closed] branches: - main
jobs: build_and_deploy_job: if: github.event_name == 'push' || (github.event_name == 'pull_request' && github.event.action != 'closed') runs-on: ubuntu-latest name: Build and Deploy Job steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v5 with: submodules: true lfs: false - name: Setup Node.js uses: actions/setup-node@v5 with: node-version: '20' - name: Install Dependencies id: installdeps run: npm ci - name: Install Playwright Browser id: installplaywright run: | # Retry once to smooth over transient apt/network failures on runners. npx playwright install --with-deps chromium || ( echo "Playwright install failed on first attempt, retrying..." && sleep 8 && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium ) - name: Start Local Static Server For Smoke Tests id: startlocalserver run: | python3 -m http.server 4173 --bind 127.0.0.1 > /tmp/swa-local-server.log 2>&1 & echo $! > /tmp/swa-local-server.pid - name: Wait For Local Server id: waitlocalserver run: | for i in {1..40}; do if curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:4173/ >/dev/null; then echo "Local server is ready" exit 0 fi sleep 0.5 done echo "Local server failed to start" cat /tmp/swa-local-server.log || true exit 1 - name: Reliability Ownership Check id: reliabilityownership run: npm run reliability:ownership - name: Reliability Smoke Suite id: reliabilitysmoke env: APP_URL: http://127.0.0.1:4173 run: npm run reliability:smoke - name: Upload Playwright diagnostics if: always() uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 with: name: playwright-diagnostics-${{ github.run_id }} path: | test-results/**/trace.zip test-results/**/error-context.md test-results/**/*.png test-results/**/*.jpg test-results/**/*.jpeg test-results/**/*.webm test-results/**/*.mp4 if-no-files-found: ignore retention-days: 7 - name: Summarize Playwright diagnostics artifact if: always() run: | echo '- **Diagnostics artifact:** `playwright-diagnostics-${{ github.run_id }}` (Actions run page -> **Artifacts**)' >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY" - name: Reliability Release Gate id: reliabilitygate run: npm run reliability:gate - name: Stamp Deployment Metadata id: stampdeploymentmetadata run: | SHORT_SHA="$(echo "${GITHUB_SHA}" | cut -c1-8)" DEPLOYMENT_TAG="ci.${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}.${SHORT_SHA}" DEPLOYED_AT_ISO="$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"
echo "DEPLOYMENT_TAG=${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}" >> "$GITHUB_ENV" echo "DEPLOYED_AT_ISO=${DEPLOYED_AT_ISO}" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"
DEPLOYMENT_TAG="${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}" DEPLOYED_AT_ISO="${DEPLOYED_AT_ISO}" node scripts/stamp-deployment-metadata.js
grep -n "const DEPLOYMENT_TAG" index.html grep -n "const DEPLOYED_AT_ISO" index.html
{ echo "- **Deployment tag:** ${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}" echo "- **Deployed at (UTC):** ${DEPLOYED_AT_ISO}" } >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY" - name: Stop Local Static Server if: always() run: | if [ -f /tmp/swa-local-server.pid ]; then kill "$(cat /tmp/swa-local-server.pid)" || true fi - name: Determine Deploy Eligibility id: deployeligibility if: always() env: SWA_DEPLOYMENT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AZURE_STATIC_WEB_APPS_API_TOKEN_VICTORIOUS_WAVE_0EC1BB10F }} SWA_EVENT_NAME: ${{ github.event_name }} SWA_PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }} run: | if [ "${SWA_EVENT_NAME}" = "pull_request" ] && [ -n "${SWA_PR_NUMBER}" ]; then SWA_ENVIRONMENT="pr-${SWA_PR_NUMBER}" else SWA_ENVIRONMENT="production" fi
if [ -z "${SWA_DEPLOYMENT_TOKEN}" ]; then echo "should_deploy=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" echo "reason=Missing SWA deployment token secret" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" else echo "should_deploy=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" echo "reason=Deployment token available" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" fi
echo "environment=${SWA_ENVIRONMENT}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" # Primary deploy path uses Azure/static-web-apps-deploy@v1 (proven reliable). - name: Build And Deploy (Azure action) id: builddeploy if: ${{ success() && steps.deployeligibility.outputs.should_deploy == 'true' }} continue-on-error: true uses: Azure/static-web-apps-deploy@v1 with: azure_static_web_apps_api_token: ${{ secrets.AZURE_STATIC_WEB_APPS_API_TOKEN_VICTORIOUS_WAVE_0EC1BB10F }} repo_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }} action: "upload" app_location: "/" api_location: "api" output_location: "."
# Fallback to SWA CLI if Azure action fails. - name: Build And Deploy (SWA CLI fallback) id: deploycli if: ${{ steps.deployeligibility.outputs.should_deploy == 'true' && steps.builddeploy.outcome == 'failure' }} continue-on-error: true env: SWA_DEPLOYMENT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AZURE_STATIC_WEB_APPS_API_TOKEN_VICTORIOUS_WAVE_0EC1BB10F }} SWA_ENVIRONMENT: ${{ steps.deployeligibility.outputs.environment }} run: | echo "Deploying via SWA CLI fallback (${SWA_ENVIRONMENT})" for attempt in 1 2 3; do if npx --yes @azure/static-web-apps-cli@2.0.7 deploy . \ --deployment-token "${SWA_DEPLOYMENT_TOKEN}" \ --api-location "api" \ --api-language "node" \ --api-version "20" \ --env "${SWA_ENVIRONMENT}"; then exit 0 fi echo "SWA CLI deploy attempt ${attempt} failed" if [ "${attempt}" -lt 3 ]; then sleep $((attempt * 6)) fi done exit 1
- name: Deploy Path Summary if: always() run: | FAILED_PREREQ_NAME="" FAILED_PREREQ_ID="" icon_for_outcome() { case "$1" in success) printf '✅ %s' "$1" ;; failure) printf '⚠️ %s' "$1" ;; skipped) printf '⏭️ %s' "$1" ;; *) printf '• %s' "${1:-unknown}" ;; esac }
if [ "${{ steps.installdeps.outcome }}" = "failure" ]; then FAILED_PREREQ_NAME="Install Dependencies" FAILED_PREREQ_ID="installdeps" elif [ "${{ steps.installplaywright.outcome }}" = "failure" ]; then FAILED_PREREQ_NAME="Install Playwright Browser" FAILED_PREREQ_ID="installplaywright" elif [ "${{ steps.startlocalserver.outcome }}" = "failure" ]; then FAILED_PREREQ_NAME="Start Local Static Server For Smoke Tests" FAILED_PREREQ_ID="startlocalserver" elif [ "${{ steps.waitlocalserver.outcome }}" = "failure" ]; then FAILED_PREREQ_NAME="Wait For Local Server" FAILED_PREREQ_ID="waitlocalserver" elif [ "${{ steps.reliabilityownership.outcome }}" = "failure" ]; then FAILED_PREREQ_NAME="Reliability Ownership Check" FAILED_PREREQ_ID="reliabilityownership" elif [ "${{ steps.reliabilitysmoke.outcome }}" = "failure" ]; then FAILED_PREREQ_NAME="Reliability Smoke Suite" FAILED_PREREQ_ID="reliabilitysmoke" elif [ "${{ steps.reliabilitygate.outcome }}" = "failure" ]; then FAILED_PREREQ_NAME="Reliability Release Gate" FAILED_PREREQ_ID="reliabilitygate" elif [ "${{ steps.stampdeploymentmetadata.outcome }}" = "failure" ]; then FAILED_PREREQ_NAME="Stamp Deployment Metadata" FAILED_PREREQ_ID="stampdeploymentmetadata" fi
FINAL_DEPLOY_PATH="" BLOCKING_PREREQ_SUMMARY="None" if [ -n "${FAILED_PREREQ_NAME}" ]; then BLOCKING_PREREQ_SUMMARY="${FAILED_PREREQ_NAME} (${FAILED_PREREQ_ID})" fi
{ echo "### Pre-deploy step outcomes" echo "| Step | Id | Outcome | Notes |" echo "| --- | --- | --- | --- |" echo "| Install Dependencies | installdeps | $(icon_for_outcome "${{ steps.installdeps.outcome }}") | $([ "${{ steps.installdeps.outcome }}" = "failure" ] && echo "Blocking failure" || echo "") |" echo "| Install Playwright Browser | installplaywright | $(icon_for_outcome "${{ steps.installplaywright.outcome }}") | $([ "${{ steps.installplaywright.outcome }}" = "failure" ] && echo "Blocking failure" || echo "") |" echo "| Start Local Static Server For Smoke Tests | startlocalserver | $(icon_for_outcome "${{ steps.startlocalserver.outcome }}") | $([ "${{ steps.startlocalserver.outcome }}" = "failure" ] && echo "Blocking failure" || echo "") |" echo "| Wait For Local Server | waitlocalserver | $(icon_for_outcome "${{ steps.waitlocalserver.outcome }}") | $([ "${{ steps.waitlocalserver.outcome }}" = "failure" ] && echo "Blocking failure" || echo "") |" echo "| Reliability Ownership Check | reliabilityownership | $(icon_for_outcome "${{ steps.reliabilityownership.outcome }}") | $([ "${{ steps.reliabilityownership.outcome }}" = "failure" ] && echo "Blocking failure" || echo "") |" echo "| Reliability Smoke Suite | reliabilitysmoke | $(icon_for_outcome "${{ steps.reliabilitysmoke.outcome }}") | $([ "${{ steps.reliabilitysmoke.outcome }}" = "failure" ] && echo "Blocking failure" || echo "") |" echo "| Reliability Release Gate | reliabilitygate | $(icon_for_outcome "${{ steps.reliabilitygate.outcome }}") | $([ "${{ steps.reliabilitygate.outcome }}" = "failure" ] && echo "Blocking failure" || echo "") |" echo "| Stamp Deployment Metadata | stampdeploymentmetadata | $(icon_for_outcome "${{ steps.stampdeploymentmetadata.outcome }}") | $([ "${{ steps.stampdeploymentmetadata.outcome }}" = "failure" ] && echo "Blocking failure" || echo "") |" echo "" } >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
if [ "${{ steps.deployeligibility.outputs.should_deploy }}" != "true" ]; then echo "::notice::Deploy skipped: ${{ steps.deployeligibility.outputs.reason }}" FINAL_DEPLOY_PATH="⏭️ skipped (${{ steps.deployeligibility.outputs.reason }})" elif [ "${{ steps.builddeploy.outcome }}" = "success" ]; then echo "::notice::Deploy source: primary Azure/static-web-apps-deploy action" FINAL_DEPLOY_PATH="✅ primary (Azure/static-web-apps-deploy)" elif [ "${{ steps.deploycli.outcome }}" = "success" ]; then echo "::notice::Deploy source: fallback SWA CLI" FINAL_DEPLOY_PATH="✅ fallback (SWA CLI)" elif [ "${{ steps.builddeploy.outcome }}" = "failure" ] || [ "${{ steps.deploycli.outcome }}" = "failure" ]; then echo "::warning::Deploy source: attempted but failed (cli=${{ steps.deploycli.outcome }}, fallback=${{ steps.builddeploy.outcome }})" FINAL_DEPLOY_PATH="⚠️ failed (cli=${{ steps.deploycli.outcome }}, fallback=${{ steps.builddeploy.outcome }})" { echo "### Deploy status" echo "| Field | Value |" echo "| --- | --- |" echo "| Eligibility | ${{ steps.deployeligibility.outputs.should_deploy }} (${{ steps.deployeligibility.outputs.reason }}) |" echo "| Target environment | ${{ steps.deployeligibility.outputs.environment }} |" echo "| Blocking prerequisite | ${BLOCKING_PREREQ_SUMMARY} |" echo "| Deploy path | ${FINAL_DEPLOY_PATH} |" echo "" } >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY" exit 1 else if [ -n "${FAILED_PREREQ_NAME}" ]; then echo "::notice::Deploy not attempted because prerequisite failed: ${FAILED_PREREQ_NAME}" FINAL_DEPLOY_PATH="⏭️ not attempted (blocked by ${FAILED_PREREQ_NAME}; cli=${{ steps.deploycli.outcome }}, fallback=${{ steps.builddeploy.outcome }})" else echo "::notice::Deploy not attempted because an earlier step failed or the job was interrupted (cli=${{ steps.deploycli.outcome }}, fallback=${{ steps.builddeploy.outcome }})" FINAL_DEPLOY_PATH="⏭️ not attempted (earlier step failure or interruption; cli=${{ steps.deploycli.outcome }}, fallback=${{ steps.builddeploy.outcome }})" fi fi
{ echo "### Deploy status" echo "| Field | Value |" echo "| --- | --- |" echo "| Eligibility | ${{ steps.deployeligibility.outputs.should_deploy }} (${{ steps.deployeligibility.outputs.reason }}) |" echo "| Target environment | ${{ steps.deployeligibility.outputs.environment }} |" echo "| Blocking prerequisite | ${BLOCKING_PREREQ_SUMMARY} |" echo "| Deploy path | ${FINAL_DEPLOY_PATH} |" echo "" } >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
- name: Post-Deploy Tag Verification (blocking) if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && (steps.builddeploy.outcome == 'success' || steps.deploycli.outcome == 'success') }} env: APP_URL: https://victorious-wave-0ec1bb10f.1.azurestaticapps.net/ run: | echo "Running blocking live tag verification against ${APP_URL}" MAX_ATTEMPTS=20 SLEEP_SECONDS=30 TAG_FOUND=false
echo "Waiting 30s for deployment to register before first probe..." sleep 30
for attempt in $(seq 1 "${MAX_ATTEMPTS}"); do TS="$(date +%s)" LIVE_HTML="$(curl -fsS "${APP_URL}?nocache=${TS}")" if echo "${LIVE_HTML}" | grep -F "${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then TAG_FOUND=true echo "::notice::Live app contains current deployment tag: ${DEPLOYMENT_TAG} (attempt ${attempt}/${MAX_ATTEMPTS})" echo "- **Live deployment tag check:** found ${DEPLOYMENT_TAG} (attempt ${attempt}/${MAX_ATTEMPTS})" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY" break fi
echo "Attempt ${attempt}/${MAX_ATTEMPTS}: deployment tag ${DEPLOYMENT_TAG} not visible yet." if [ "${attempt}" -lt "${MAX_ATTEMPTS}" ]; then sleep "${SLEEP_SECONDS}" fi done
if [ "${TAG_FOUND}" != "true" ]; then echo "::error::Live app never exposed deployment tag ${DEPLOYMENT_TAG} after ${MAX_ATTEMPTS} x ${SLEEP_SECONDS}s attempts (~$((MAX_ATTEMPTS * SLEEP_SECONDS / 60))min). Failing release to prevent stale green deploys." echo "- **Live deployment tag check:** missing ${DEPLOYMENT_TAG} after ${MAX_ATTEMPTS} attempts (~$((MAX_ATTEMPTS * SLEEP_SECONDS / 60))min total)" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY" exit 1 fi
npx playwright test tests/reliability-smoke.spec.js --grep "first-click success: nature explore" --reporter=list

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
name: Azure Static Web Apps CI/CD
env: FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24: true
on: push: branches: - main pull_request: types: [opened, synchronize, reopened, closed] branches: - main
jobs: build_and_deploy_job: if: github.event_name == 'push' || (github.event_name == 'pull_request' && github.event.action != 'closed') runs-on: ubuntu-latest name: Build and Deploy Job steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v5 with: submodules: true lfs: false - name: Setup Node.js uses: actions/setup-node@v5 with: node-version: '20' - name: Install Dependencies id: installdeps run: npm ci - name: Install Playwright Browser id: installplaywright run: | # Retry once to smooth over transient apt/network failures on runners. npx playwright install --with-deps chromium || ( echo "Playwright install failed on first attempt, retrying..." && sleep 8 && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium ) - name: Start Local Static Server For Smoke Tests id: startlocalserver run: | python3 -m http.server 4173 --bind 127.0.0.1 > /tmp/swa-local-server.log 2>&1 & echo $! > /tmp/swa-local-server.pid - name: Wait For Local Server id: waitlocalserver run: | for i in {1..40}; do if curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:4173/ >/dev/null; then echo "Local server is ready" exit 0 fi sleep 0.5 done echo "Local server failed to start" cat /tmp/swa-local-server.log || true exit 1 - name: Reliability Ownership Check id: reliabilityownership run: npm run reliability:ownership - name: Reliability Smoke Suite id: reliabilitysmoke env: APP_URL: http://127.0.0.1:4173 run: npm run reliability:smoke - name: Upload Playwright diagnostics if: always() uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 with: name: playwright-diagnostics-${{ github.run_id }} path: | test-results/**/trace.zip test-results/**/error-context.md test-results/**/*.png test-results/**/*.jpg test-results/**/*.jpeg test-results/**/*.webm test-results/**/*.mp4 if-no-files-found: ignore retention-days: 7 - name: Summarize Playwright diagnostics artifact if: always() run: | echo '- **Diagnostics artifact:** `playwright-diagnostics-${{ github.run_id }}` (Actions run page -> **Artifacts**)' >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY" - name: Reliability Release Gate id: reliabilitygate run: npm run reliability:gate - name: Stamp Deployment Metadata id: stampdeploymentmetadata run: | SHORT_SHA="$(echo "${GITHUB_SHA}" | cut -c1-8)" DEPLOYMENT_TAG="ci.${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}.${SHORT_SHA}" DEPLOYED_AT_ISO="$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"
echo "DEPLOYMENT_TAG=${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}" >> "$GITHUB_ENV" echo "DEPLOYED_AT_ISO=${DEPLOYED_AT_ISO}" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"
DEPLOYMENT_TAG="${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}" DEPLOYED_AT_ISO="${DEPLOYED_AT_ISO}" node scripts/stamp-deployment-metadata.js
grep -n "const DEPLOYMENT_TAG" index.html grep -n "const DEPLOYED_AT_ISO" index.html
{ echo "- **Deployment tag:** ${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}" echo "- **Deployed at (UTC):** ${DEPLOYED_AT_ISO}" } >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY" - name: Stop Local Static Server if: always() run: | if [ -f /tmp/swa-local-server.pid ]; then kill "$(cat /tmp/swa-local-server.pid)" || true fi - name: Determine Deploy Eligibility id: deployeligibility if: always() env: SWA_DEPLOYMENT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AZURE_STATIC_WEB_APPS_API_TOKEN_VICTORIOUS_WAVE_0EC1BB10F }} SWA_EVENT_NAME: ${{ github.event_name }} SWA_PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }} run: | if [ "${SWA_EVENT_NAME}" = "pull_request" ] && [ -n "${SWA_PR_NUMBER}" ]; then SWA_ENVIRONMENT="pr-${SWA_PR_NUMBER}" else SWA_ENVIRONMENT="production" fi
if [ -z "${SWA_DEPLOYMENT_TOKEN}" ]; then echo "should_deploy=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" echo "reason=Missing SWA deployment token secret" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" else echo "should_deploy=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" echo "reason=Deployment token available" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" fi
echo "environment=${SWA_ENVIRONMENT}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" # Primary deploy path uses Azure/static-web-apps-deploy@v1 (proven reliable). - name: Build And Deploy (Azure action) id: builddeploy if: ${{ success() && steps.deployeligibility.outputs.should_deploy == 'true' }} continue-on-error: true uses: Azure/static-web-apps-deploy@v1 with: azure_static_web_apps_api_token: ${{ secrets.AZURE_STATIC_WEB_APPS_API_TOKEN_VICTORIOUS_WAVE_0EC1BB10F }} repo_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }} action: "upload" app_location: "/" api_location: "api" output_location: "."
# Fallback to SWA CLI if Azure action fails. - name: Build And Deploy (SWA CLI fallback) id: deploycli if: ${{ steps.deployeligibility.outputs.should_deploy == 'true' && steps.builddeploy.outcome == 'failure' }} continue-on-error: true env: SWA_DEPLOYMENT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AZURE_STATIC_WEB_APPS_API_TOKEN_VICTORIOUS_WAVE_0EC1BB10F }} SWA_ENVIRONMENT: ${{ steps.deployeligibility.outputs.environment }} run: | echo "Deploying via SWA CLI fallback (${SWA_ENVIRONMENT})" for attempt in 1 2 3; do if npx --yes @azure/static-web-apps-cli@2.0.7 deploy . \ --deployment-token "${SWA_DEPLOYMENT_TOKEN}" \ --api-location "api" \ --api-language "node" \ --api-version "20" \ --env "${SWA_ENVIRONMENT}"; then exit 0 fi echo "SWA CLI deploy attempt ${attempt} failed" if [ "${attempt}" -lt 3 ]; then sleep $((attempt * 6)) fi done exit 1
- name: Deploy Path Summary if: always() run: | FAILED_PREREQ_NAME="" FAILED_PREREQ_ID="" icon_for_outcome() { case "$1" in success) printf '✅ %s' "$1" ;; failure) printf '⚠️ %s' "$1" ;; skipped) printf '⏭️ %s' "$1" ;; *) printf '• %s' "${1:-unknown}" ;; esac }
if [ "${{ steps.installdeps.outcome }}" = "failure" ]; then FAILED_PREREQ_NAME="Install Dependencies" FAILED_PREREQ_ID="installdeps" elif [ "${{ steps.installplaywright.outcome }}" = "failure" ]; then FAILED_PREREQ_NAME="Install Playwright Browser" FAILED_PREREQ_ID="installplaywright" elif [ "${{ steps.startlocalserver.outcome }}" = "failure" ]; then FAILED_PREREQ_NAME="Start Local Static Server For Smoke Tests" FAILED_PREREQ_ID="startlocalserver" elif [ "${{ steps.waitlocalserver.outcome }}" = "failure" ]; then FAILED_PREREQ_NAME="Wait For Local Server" FAILED_PREREQ_ID="waitlocalserver" elif [ "${{ steps.reliabilityownership.outcome }}" = "failure" ]; then FAILED_PREREQ_NAME="Reliability Ownership Check" FAILED_PREREQ_ID="reliabilityownership" elif [ "${{ steps.reliabilitysmoke.outcome }}" = "failure" ]; then FAILED_PREREQ_NAME="Reliability Smoke Suite" FAILED_PREREQ_ID="reliabilitysmoke" elif [ "${{ steps.reliabilitygate.outcome }}" = "failure" ]; then FAILED_PREREQ_NAME="Reliability Release Gate" FAILED_PREREQ_ID="reliabilitygate" elif [ "${{ steps.stampdeploymentmetadata.outcome }}" = "failure" ]; then FAILED_PREREQ_NAME="Stamp Deployment Metadata" FAILED_PREREQ_ID="stampdeploymentmetadata" fi
FINAL_DEPLOY_PATH="" BLOCKING_PREREQ_SUMMARY="None" if [ -n "${FAILED_PREREQ_NAME}" ]; then BLOCKING_PREREQ_SUMMARY="${FAILED_PREREQ_NAME} (${FAILED_PREREQ_ID})" fi
{ echo "### Pre-deploy step outcomes" echo "| Step | Id | Outcome | Notes |" echo "| --- | --- | --- | --- |" echo "| Install Dependencies | installdeps | $(icon_for_outcome "${{ steps.installdeps.outcome }}") | $([ "${{ steps.installdeps.outcome }}" = "failure" ] && echo "Blocking failure" || echo "") |" echo "| Install Playwright Browser | installplaywright | $(icon_for_outcome "${{ steps.installplaywright.outcome }}") | $([ "${{ steps.installplaywright.outcome }}" = "failure" ] && echo "Blocking failure" || echo "") |" echo "| Start Local Static Server For Smoke Tests | startlocalserver | $(icon_for_outcome "${{ steps.startlocalserver.outcome }}") | $([ "${{ steps.startlocalserver.outcome }}" = "failure" ] && echo "Blocking failure" || echo "") |" echo "| Wait For Local Server | waitlocalserver | $(icon_for_outcome "${{ steps.waitlocalserver.outcome }}") | $([ "${{ steps.waitlocalserver.outcome }}" = "failure" ] && echo "Blocking failure" || echo "") |" echo "| Reliability Ownership Check | reliabilityownership | $(icon_for_outcome "${{ steps.reliabilityownership.outcome }}") | $([ "${{ steps.reliabilityownership.outcome }}" = "failure" ] && echo "Blocking failure" || echo "") |" echo "| Reliability Smoke Suite | reliabilitysmoke | $(icon_for_outcome "${{ steps.reliabilitysmoke.outcome }}") | $([ "${{ steps.reliabilitysmoke.outcome }}" = "failure" ] && echo "Blocking failure" || echo "") |" echo "| Reliability Release Gate | reliabilitygate | $(icon_for_outcome "${{ steps.reliabilitygate.outcome }}") | $([ "${{ steps.reliabilitygate.outcome }}" = "failure" ] && echo "Blocking failure" || echo "") |" echo "| Stamp Deployment Metadata | stampdeploymentmetadata | $(icon_for_outcome "${{ steps.stampdeploymentmetadata.outcome }}") | $([ "${{ steps.stampdeploymentmetadata.outcome }}" = "failure" ] && echo "Blocking failure" || echo "") |" echo "" } >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
if [ "${{ steps.deployeligibility.outputs.should_deploy }}" != "true" ]; then echo "::notice::Deploy skipped: ${{ steps.deployeligibility.outputs.reason }}" FINAL_DEPLOY_PATH="⏭️ skipped (${{ steps.deployeligibility.outputs.reason }})" elif [ "${{ steps.builddeploy.outcome }}" = "success" ]; then echo "::notice::Deploy source: primary Azure/static-web-apps-deploy action" FINAL_DEPLOY_PATH="✅ primary (Azure/static-web-apps-deploy)" elif [ "${{ steps.deploycli.outcome }}" = "success" ]; then echo "::notice::Deploy source: fallback SWA CLI" FINAL_DEPLOY_PATH="✅ fallback (SWA CLI)" elif [ "${{ steps.builddeploy.outcome }}" = "failure" ] || [ "${{ steps.deploycli.outcome }}" = "failure" ]; then echo "::warning::Deploy source: attempted but failed (cli=${{ steps.deploycli.outcome }}, fallback=${{ steps.builddeploy.outcome }})" FINAL_DEPLOY_PATH="⚠️ failed (cli=${{ steps.deploycli.outcome }}, fallback=${{ steps.builddeploy.outcome }})" { echo "### Deploy status" echo "| Field | Value |" echo "| --- | --- |" echo "| Eligibility | ${{ steps.deployeligibility.outputs.should_deploy }} (${{ steps.deployeligibility.outputs.reason }}) |" echo "| Target environment | ${{ steps.deployeligibility.outputs.environment }} |" echo "| Blocking prerequisite | ${BLOCKING_PREREQ_SUMMARY} |" echo "| Deploy path | ${FINAL_DEPLOY_PATH} |" echo "" } >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY" exit 1 else if [ -n "${FAILED_PREREQ_NAME}" ]; then echo "::notice::Deploy not attempted because prerequisite failed: ${FAILED_PREREQ_NAME}" FINAL_DEPLOY_PATH="⏭️ not attempted (blocked by ${FAILED_PREREQ_NAME}; cli=${{ steps.deploycli.outcome }}, fallback=${{ steps.builddeploy.outcome }})" else echo "::notice::Deploy not attempted because an earlier step failed or the job was interrupted (cli=${{ steps.deploycli.outcome }}, fallback=${{ steps.builddeploy.outcome }})" FINAL_DEPLOY_PATH="⏭️ not attempted (earlier step failure or interruption; cli=${{ steps.deploycli.outcome }}, fallback=${{ steps.builddeploy.outcome }})" fi fi
{ echo "### Deploy status" echo "| Field | Value |" echo "| --- | --- |" echo "| Eligibility | ${{ steps.deployeligibility.outputs.should_deploy }} (${{ steps.deployeligibility.outputs.reason }}) |" echo "| Target environment | ${{ steps.deployeligibility.outputs.environment }} |" echo "| Blocking prerequisite | ${BLOCKING_PREREQ_SUMMARY} |" echo "| Deploy path | ${FINAL_DEPLOY_PATH} |" echo "" } >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
- name: Post-Deploy Tag Verification (blocking) if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && (steps.builddeploy.outcome == 'success' || steps.deploycli.outcome == 'success') }} env: APP_URL: https://victorious-wave-0ec1bb10f.1.azurestaticapps.net/ run: | echo "Running blocking live tag verification against ${APP_URL}" MAX_ATTEMPTS=20 SLEEP_SECONDS=30 TAG_FOUND=false
echo "Waiting 30s for deployment to register before first probe..." sleep 30
for attempt in $(seq 1 "${MAX_ATTEMPTS}"); do TS="$(date +%s)" LIVE_HTML="$(curl -fsS "${APP_URL}?nocache=${TS}")" if echo "${LIVE_HTML}" | grep -F "${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then TAG_FOUND=true echo "::notice::Live app contains current deployment tag: ${DEPLOYMENT_TAG} (attempt ${attempt}/${MAX_ATTEMPTS})" echo "- **Live deployment tag check:** found ${DEPLOYMENT_TAG} (attempt ${attempt}/${MAX_ATTEMPTS})" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY" break fi
echo "Attempt ${attempt}/${MAX_ATTEMPTS}: deployment tag ${DEPLOYMENT_TAG} not visible yet." if [ "${attempt}" -lt "${MAX_ATTEMPTS}" ]; then sleep "${SLEEP_SECONDS}" fi done
if [ "${TAG_FOUND}" != "true" ]; then echo "::error::Live app never exposed deployment tag ${DEPLOYMENT_TAG} after ${MAX_ATTEMPTS} x ${SLEEP_SECONDS}s attempts (~$((MAX_ATTEMPTS * SLEEP_SECONDS / 60))min). Failing release to prevent stale green deploys." echo "- **Live deployment tag check:** missing ${DEPLOYMENT_TAG} after ${MAX_ATTEMPTS} attempts (~$((MAX_ATTEMPTS * SLEEP_SECONDS / 60))min total)" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY" exit 1 fi
- name: Post-Deploy Smoke Diagnostics if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && (steps.builddeploy.outcome == 'success' || steps.deploycli.outcome == 'success') }} run: | WHOAMI_VALUE="$(whoami)" ID_VALUE="$(id)" WORKSPACE_LS_LAD="$(ls -lad "${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}" 2>/dev/null || echo 'unavailable')" TEST_RESULTS_LS_LAD="$(ls -lad "${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/test-results" 2>/dev/null || echo 'missing')"
echo "Collecting runner identity and ownership context before post-deploy smoke..." echo "whoami: ${WHOAMI_VALUE}" echo "${ID_VALUE}" echo "workspace: ${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}" ls -lad "${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}" || true ls -la "${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}" | head -n 200 || true echo "test-results directory details (if present):" ls -lad "${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/test-results" || true ls -la "${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/test-results" || true
{ echo "### Post-deploy smoke diagnostics" echo "| Field | Value |" echo "| --- | --- |" echo "| whoami | \`${WHOAMI_VALUE}\` |" echo "| id | \`${ID_VALUE}\` |" echo "| workspace | \`${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}\` |" echo "| workspace (ls -lad) | \`${WORKSPACE_LS_LAD}\` |" echo "| test-results (ls -lad) | \`${TEST_RESULTS_LS_LAD}\` |" echo "| details | See raw logs in **Post-Deploy Smoke Diagnostics** step for full listings. |" echo "" } >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
- name: Post-Deploy Smoke Check (blocking) if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' && (steps.builddeploy.outcome == 'success' || steps.deploycli.outcome == 'success') }} env: APP_URL: https://victorious-wave-0ec1bb10f.1.azurestaticapps.net/ run: | POST_DEPLOY_RESULTS_DIR="${RUNNER_TEMP}/post-deploy-playwright-${GITHUB_RUN_ID}" mkdir -p "${POST_DEPLOY_RESULTS_DIR}" npx playwright test tests/reliability-smoke.spec.js --config=playwright.config.production.js --grep "first-click success: nature explore" --reporter=list --output="${POST_DEPLOY_RESULTS_DIR}"
